script.name: !carrier.drone
script.sourceplaintext:
$null = null
$dropWares = table alloc $dropMarines = table alloc $last.repair = playing time
while [TRUE] @ = wait 5000 ms
* check if theres a new script version, and restart it if is a new script version available $task = get task ID $scriptName = get script name @ START $null -> call script !lib.restart.task : Object=[THIS] Script=$scriptName Task=$task Argument 1=null Argument 2=null Argument 3=null Argument 4=null Argument 5=null break end
skip if [THIS] -> is of class M7D return null
if not [THIS] -> is script !ship.cmd.drone.supply on stack of task=0 * check any drones to empty their wares $drone = get next key: table=$dropWares key=null while $drone $env = $drone -> get environment if $env == [THIS] @ = $drone -> call script !lib.dronecarrier.switchweapon : Weapon=null
$tWares = $drone ->get wares table: include equipped=[FALSE] if $tWares $ware = get next key: table=$tWares key=null while $ware $amt = $tWares[$ware] = $drone -> unload $amt units of $ware $ware = get next key: table=$tWares key=$ware end end
end $drone = get next key: table=$dropWares key=$drone end end
$drone = get next key: table=$dropMarines key=null while $drone $env = $drone -> get environment if $env == [THIS] $aMarines = $drone -> get marines array if $aMarines $i = size of array $aMarines while $i dec $i = $marine = $aMarines[$i] if [THIS] -> free space for marines = $marine -> move passenger to ship [THIS]: set passenger as pilot=[FALSE] end end end end $drone = get next key: table=$dropMarines key=$drone end clear table $dropWares clear table $dropMarines
* check we have any ships to do the actual supply $time = playing time $should.repair = [FALSE] do if ( $last.repair + 180 ) > $time $should.repair = [TRUE]
do if $should.repair $last.repair = $time
$aDrones = [THIS] ->get managed ships: role=Drone $i = size of array $aDrones while $i dec $i = $drone = $aDrones[$i] $env = $drone -> get environment if $env == [THIS] if $should.repair $hull = $drone -> get hull percent if $hull < 100 $max.hull = $drone -> get max hull $amt = fixed multiply and divide: $max.hull * 2 / 100 do if $amt < 2 $amt = 2 $hull = $drone -> get hull $hull = $hull + $amt $drone ->set hull to $hull end end
$dropWares[$drone] = $drone $aMarines = $drone -> get marines array if $aMarines do if size of array $aMarines $dropMarines[$drone] = $drone end end end
* Drones should automatically repair the carrier if idle gosub sub.Repair.Self end return null
* =========================================== * SUB: Repair carrier with own drones if not busy * =========================================== sub.Repair.Self: $cmd = [THIS] -> get command do if $cmd == COMMAND_CARRIER_RECALL endsub $hull = [THIS] -> get hull percent do if $hull > 60 endsub $dronesBusy = [FALSE] $i = size of array $aDrones while $i dec $i = $drone = $aDrones[$i] @ if [THIS] -> call script !lib.carrier.isshipbusy : Ship=$drone Allow Recall=[FALSE] $dronesBusy = [TRUE] break end end if $dronesBusy == [FALSE] if [THIS] -> is task 0 in use [THIS] ->interrupt with script !ship.cmd.repairobject.drones and prio 100: arg1=[THIS] arg2=null arg3=null arg4=null else if not get task ID @ = [THIS] -> call script !ship.cmd.repairobject.drones : =[THIS] ???=null else @ START [THIS] -> call script !ship.cmd.repairobject.drones : =[THIS] ???=null end end endsub
return null

comment.var: check if theres a new script version, and restart it

line.text: is a new script version available

comment.var: check any drones to empty their wares
check we have any ships to do the actual supply
Drones should automatically repair the carrier if idle
SUB: Repair carrier with own drones if not busy

sval.val: check if theres a new script version, and restart it
check any drones to empty their wares
check we have any ships to do the actual supply
Drones should automatically repair the carrier if idle
SUB: Repair carrier with own drones if not busy
